description: Case style: Analogue watch with a stainless steel, rectangular caseDial style: Black dial, steel toned hands and markings, branding on the dialStrap style: Stainless steel, dual-strand and bracelet style strap with a butterfly clasp closureFeatures: Screw to reset timeWater resistant up to 30 mComes in a signature Fastrack caseWarranty: 2-year warranty on mechanism only, 1-year warranty on battery and metal strap (manufacturing defects only)
